metadata.description: 500 unique logical reasoning questions with answers and detailed explanations

questions.question: All mammals are animals. All dogs are mammals. Therefore, all dogs are ___?
No reptiles are warm-blooded. Snakes are reptiles. Therefore, snakes are ___?
All roses are flowers. Some flowers fade quickly. Therefore ___?
All lawyers are educated. John is educated. Therefore, John is ___?
Some poets are artists. All artists are creative. Therefore ___?
options: D) All creative people are poets

questions.question: No fish are mammals. Whales are mammals. Therefore ___?
All fruits contain seeds. Bananas are fruits. Therefore ___?
Some students are athletes. All athletes are disciplined. Therefore ___?
options: D) All disciplined people are students

questions.question: All judges are fair-minded. Some judges are politicians. Therefore ___?
options: D) All fair-minded people are judges

questions.question: No cowards are heroes. Some soldiers are heroes. Therefore ___?
options: D) Some soldiers are not cowards

options: B) If not B then not A
C) If A then not B
D) If B then not A

C) If X then not Y
D) If not X then Y
